verses.geez: በቀዳሚ ፡ ገብረ ፡ እግዚአብሔር ፡ ሰማየ ፡ ወምድረ ።

translations.lxx: In the beginning God made the heaven and the earth.
translations.kjv: In the beginning God created the heaven and the earth.

verses.geez:
ወምድርሰ ፡ ኢታስተርኢ ፡ ወኢኮነት ፡ ድሉተ ፡ ወጽልመት ፡ መልዕልተ ፡ ቀላይ ፡ ወመንፈሰ ፡ እግዚአብሔር ፡ ይጼልል ፡
                  መልዕልተ ፡ ማይ ።

translations.lxx: But the earth was unsightly and unfurnished, and darkness was over the deep, and the Spirit of God moved over the water.
translations.kjv: And the earth was without form, and void; and darkness was upon the face of the deep. And the Spirit of God moved upon the face of the waters.

verses.geez: ወይቤ ፡ እግዚአብሔር ፡ ለይኩን ፡ ብርሃን ፡ ወኮነ ፡ ብርሃን ።

translations.lxx: And God said, Let there be light, and there was light.
translations.kjv: And God said, Let there be light: and there was light.

verses.geez:
ወርእዮ ፡ እግዚአብሔር ፡ ለብርሃን ፡ ከመ ፡ ሠናይ ፡ ወፈለጠ ፡ እግዚአብሔር ፡ ማእከለ ፡ ብርሃን ፡ ወማእከለ ፡ ጽልመት
                  ።

translations.lxx: And God saw the light that it was good, and God divided between the light and the darkness.
translations.kjv: And God saw the light, that it was good: and God divided the light from the darkness.

verses.geez:
ወሰመዮ ፡ እግዚአብሔር ፡ ለብርሃን ፡ ዕለተ ፡ ወለጽልመት ፡ ሌሊተ ፡ ወኮነ ፡ ሌሊተ ፡ ወጸብሐ ፡ ወኮነ ፡ መዓልተ ፡ ፩
                  ።

translations.lxx: And God called the light Day, and the darkness he called Night, and there was evening and there was morning, the first day.
translations.kjv: And God called the light Day, and the darkness he called Night. And the evening and the morning were the first day.

verses.geez: ወይቤ ፡ እግዚአብሔር ፡ ለይኩን ፡ ጠፈር ፡ ማእከለ ፡ ማይ ፡ ከመ ፡ ይፍልጥ ፡ ማእከለ ፡ ማይ ፡ ወኮነ ፡ ከማሁ ።

translations.lxx: And God said, Let there be a firmament in the midst of the water, and let it be a division between water and water, and it was so.
translations.kjv: And God said, Let there be a firmament in the midst of the waters, and let it divide the waters from the waters.

verses.geez:
ወገብረ ፡ እግዚአብሔር ፡ ጠፈረ ፡ ወፈለጠ ፡ እግዚአብሔር ፡ ማእከለ ፡ ማይ ፡ ዘታሕተ ፡ ጠፈር ፡ ወማእከለ ፡ ማይ ፡
                  ዘመልዕልተ ፡ ጠፈር ።

translations.lxx: And God made the firmament, and God divided between the water which was under the firmament and the water which was above the firmament.
translations.kjv: And God made the firmament, and divided the waters which were under the firmament from the waters which were above the firmament: and it was so.

verses.geez:
ወሰመዮ ፡ እግዚአብሔር ፡ ለውእቱ ፡ ጠፈር ፡ ሰማየ ፡ ወርእየ ፡ እግዚአብሔር ፡ ከመ ፡ ሠናይ ፡ ወኮነ ፡ ሌሊተ ፡
                  ወጸብሐ ፡ ወኮነ ፡ ካልእተ ፡ ዕለተ ።

translations.lxx: And God called the firmament Heaven, and God saw that it was good, and there was evening and there was morning, the second day.
translations.kjv: And God called the firmament Heaven. And the evening and the morning were the second day.

verses.geez:
ወይቤ ፡ እግዚአብሔር ፡ ለይትጋባእ ፡ ማይ ፡ ዘመትሕተ ፡ ሰማይ ፡ ውስተ ፡ አሐዱ ፡ መካን ፡ ወያስተርኢ ፡ የብስ ፡
                  ወኮነ ፡ ከማሁ ፡ ወተጋብአ ፡ ማይ ፡ ውስተ ፡ ምእላዲሁ ፡ ወአስተርአየ ፡ የብስ ።

translations.lxx: And God said, Let the water which is under the heaven be collected into one place, and let the dry land appear, and it was so. And the water which was under the heaven was collected into its places, and the dry land appeared.
translations.kjv: And God said, Let the waters under the heaven be gathered together unto one place, and let the dry land appear: and it was so.

verses.geez:
ወሰመዮ ፡ እግዚአብሔር ፡ ለየብስ ፡ ምድረ ፡ ወለምእላዲሁ ፡ ለማይ ፡ ሰመዮ ፡ ባሕረ ፡ ወርእየ ፡ እግዚአብሔር ፡ ከመ ፡
                  ሠናይ ።

translations.lxx: And God called the dry land Earth, and the gatherings of the waters he called Seas, and God saw that it was good.
translations.kjv: And God called the dry land Earth; and the gathering together of the waters called he Seas: and God saw that it was good.

verses.geez:
ወይቤ ፡ እግዚአብሔር ፡ ለታብቍል ፡ ምድር ፡ ሐመልማለ ፡ ሣዕር ፡ ዘይዘራእ ፡ በበዘርኡ ፡ ወበበዘመዱ ፡ ወዘበበ ፡
                  አምሳሊሁ ፡ ወዕፀወ ፡ ዘይፈሪ ፡ ወይገብር ፡ ፍሬሁ ፡ ዘእምውስቴቱ ፡ ዘርኡ ፡ ዘይወጽእ ፡ ዘይከውን ፡ በበዘመዱ ፡ ዲበ ፡
                  ምድር ፡ ወኮነ ፡ ከማሁ ።

translations.lxx: And God said, Let the earth bring forth the herb of grass bearing seed according to its kind and according to its likeness, and the fruit-tree bearing fruit whose seed is in it, according to its kind on the earth, and it was so.
translations.kjv: And God said, Let the earth bring forth grass, the herb yielding seed, and the fruit tree yielding fruit after his kind, whose seed is in itself, upon the earth: and it was so.

verses.geez:
ወአውጽአት ፡ ምድር ፡ ሐመልማለ ፡ [ሣዕር ፡] ዘይዘራእ ፡ ዘርኡ ፡ ዘበበዘመዱ ፡ ወበበአርአያሁ ፡ ወዕፀወ ፡ ዘይፈሪ ፡
                  ወይገብር ፡ ፍሬሁ ፡ ዘእምውስቴቱ ፡ ዘርእ ፡ ዘይከውን ፡ በበዘመዱ ፡ መልዕልተ ፡ ምድር ፡ ወርእየ ፡ እግዚአብሔር ፡ ከመ ፡
                  ሠናይ ።

translations.lxx: And the earth brought forth the herb of grass bearing seed according to its kind and according to its likeness, and the fruit tree bearing fruit whose seed is in it, according to its kind on the earth, and God saw that it was good.
translations.kjv: And the earth brought forth grass, and herb yielding seed after his kind, and the tree yielding fruit, whose seed was in itself, after his kind: and God saw that it was good.

verses.geez: ወኮነ ፡ ሌሊተ ፡ ወጸብሐ ፡ ወኮነ ፡ ሣልስተ ፡ ዕለት ።

translations.lxx: And there was evening and there was morning, the third day.
translations.kjv: And the evening and the morning were the third day.

verses.geez:
ወይቤ ፡ እግዚአብሔር ፡ ይኩኑ ፡ ብርሃናት ፡ ውስተ ፡ ጠፈረ ፡ ሰማይ ፡ ከመ ፡ ያብርሁ ፡ ዲበ ፡ ምድር ፡ ወይፍልጡ ፡
                  ማእከለ ፡ ዕለት ፡ ወማእከለ ፡ ሌሊት ፡ ወይኩኑ ፡ ለተአምር ፡ ወለዘመን ፡ ወለመዋዕል ፡ ወለዓመታት ።

translations.lxx: And God said, Let there be lights in the firmament of the heaven to give light upon the earth, to divide between day and night, and let them be for signs and for seasons and for days and for years.
translations.kjv: And God said, Let there be lights in the firmament of the heaven to divide the day from the night; and let them be for signs, and for seasons, and for days, and years:

verses.geez: ወይኩኑ ፡ ለአብርሆ ፡ ውስተ ፡ ጠፈረ ፡ ሰማይ ፡ ከመ ፡ ያብርሁ ፡ ዲበ ፡ ምድር ፡ ወኮነ ፡ ከማሁ ።

translations.lxx: And let them be for light in the firmament of the heaven, so as to shine upon the earth, and it was so.
translations.kjv: And let them be for lights in the firmament of the heaven to give light upon the earth: and it was so.

verses.geez:
ወገብረ ፡ እግዚአብሔር ፡ ብርሃናተ ፡ ክልኤተ ፡ ዐበይተ ፡ ዘየዐቢ ፡ ብርሃን ፡ ከመ ፡ ይምልክ ፡ መዐልተ ፡ ወዘይንእስ
                  ፡ ብርሃን ፡ ከመ ፡ ይምልክ ፡ ሌሊተ ፡ ምስለ ፡ ከዋክብቲሁ ።

translations.lxx: And God made the two great lights, the greater light for regulating the day and the lesser light for regulating the night, the stars also.
translations.kjv: And God made two great lights; the greater light to rule the day, and the lesser light to rule the night: he made the stars also.

verses.geez: ወሤሞሙ ፡ እግዚአብሔር ፡ ውስተ ፡ ጠፈረ ፡ ሰማይ ፡ ከመ ፡ ያብርሁ ፡ ዲበ ፡ ምድር ፡

translations.lxx: And God placed them in the firmament of the heaven, so as to shine upon the earth,
translations.kjv: And God set them in the firmament of the heaven to give light upon the earth,

verses.geez:
ወይኰንንዋ ፡ ለዕለት ፡ ወለሌሊትኒ ፡ ወይፍልጡ ፡ ማእከለ ፡ ሌሊት ፡ ወማእከለ ፡ ብርሃን ፡ ወርእየ ፡ እግዚአብሔር ፡
                  ከመ ፡ ሠናይ ።

translations.lxx: and to regulate day and night, and to divide between the light and the darkness. And God saw that it was good.
translations.kjv: And to rule over the day and over the night, and to divide the light from the darkness: and God saw that it was good.

verses.geez: ወኮነ ፡ ሌሊተ ፡ ወጸብሐ ፡ ወኮነ ፡ ራብዕተ ፡ ዕለተ ።

translations.lxx: And there was evening and there was morning, the fourth day.
translations.kjv: And the evening and the morning were the fourth day.

verses.geez:
ወይቤ ፡ እግዚአብሔር ፡ ለታውጽእ ፡ ማይ ፡ ዘይትሐወስ ፡ ዘቦ ፡ መንፈሰ ፡ ሕይወት ፡ ወአዕዋፈ ፡ ዘይሠርር ፡ መልዕልተ
                  ፡ ምድር ፡ ወመትሕት ፡ ሰማይ ፡ ወኮነ ፡ ከማሁ ።

translations.lxx: And God said, Let the waters bring forth reptiles having life, and winged creatures flying above the earth in the firmament of heaven, and it was so.
translations.kjv: And God said, Let the waters bring forth abundantly the moving creature that hath life, and fowl that may fly above the earth in the open firmament of heaven.

verses.geez:
ወገብረ ፡ እግዚአብሔር ፡ ዐናብርተ ፡ ዐበይተ ፡ ወኵሎ ፡ ነፍሰ ፡ ሕይወት ፡ ዘይትሐወስ ፡ ዘአውጽአ ፡ ማይ ፡ በበዘመዱ
                  ፡ ወኵሎ ፡ ዖፈ ፡ ዘይሠርር ፡ በበዘመዱ ፡ ወርእየ ፡ እግዚአብሔር ፡ ከመ ፡ ሠናይ ።

translations.lxx: And God made great whales, and every living reptile, which the waters brought forth according to their kinds, and every creature that flies with wings according to its kind, and God saw that they were good.
translations.kjv: And God created great whales, and every living creature that moveth, which the waters brought forth abundantly, after their kind, and every winged fowl after his kind: and God saw that it was good.

verses.geez:
ወባረኮሙ ፡ እግዚአብሔር ፡ ወይቤ ፡ ብዝኁ ፡ ወተባዝኁ ፡ ወምልእዋ ፡ ለምድር ፡ ወአዕዋፍኒ ፡ ይብዝኁ ፡ ውስተ ፡ ምድር
                  ።

translations.lxx: And God blessed them, saying, Increase and multiply and fill the waters in the seas, and let the creatures that fly be multiplied on the earth.
translations.kjv: And God blessed them, saying, Be fruitful, and multiply, and fill the waters in the seas, and let fowl multiply in the earth.

verses.geez: ወኮነ ፡ ሌሊተ ፡ ወጸብሐ ፡ ወኮነ ፡ ኃምስተ ፡ ዕለተ ።

translations.lxx: And there was evening and there was morning, the fifth day.
translations.kjv: And the evening and the morning were the fifth day.

verses.geez:
ወይቤ ፡ እግዚአብሔር ፡ ለታውጽእ ፡ ምድር ፡ ዘመደ ፡ እንስሳ ፡ ወዘይትሐወስ ፡ ወአራዊተ ፡ ምድር ፡ ዘበበ ፡ ዘመዱ ፡
                  ወኮነ ፡ ከማሁ ።

translations.lxx: And God said, Let the earth bring forth the living creature according to its kind, quadrupeds and reptiles and wild beasts of the earth according to their kind, and it was so.
translations.kjv: And God said, Let the earth bring forth the living creature after his kind, cattle, and creeping thing, and beast of the earth after his kind: and it was so.

verses.geez:
ወገብረ ፡ እግዚአብሔር ፡ እንስሳ ፡ ዘበበ ፡ ዘመዱ ፡ [ወኵሎ ፡ ዘይትሐወስ ፡ ውስተ ፡ ምድር ፡ በበዘመዱ ፡ ወአራዊተ ፡
                  ምድር ፡ በበዘመዱ ፡] ወርእየ ፡ እግዚአብሔር ፡ ከመ ፡ ሠናይ ።

translations.lxx: And God made the wild beasts of the earth according to their kind, and cattle according to their kind, and all the reptiles of the earth according to their kind, and God saw that they were good.
translations.kjv: And God made the beast of the earth after his kind, and cattle after their kind, and every thing that creepeth upon the earth after his kind: and God saw that it was good.

verses.geez:
ወይቤ ፡ እግዚአብሔር ፡ ንግበር ፡ ሰብአ ፡ በአርአያነ ፡ ወበአምሳሊነ ፡ ወይኰንን ፡ ዐሣተ ፡ ባሕር ፡ ወአራዊተ ፡ ምድር
                  ፡ ወአዕዋፈ ፡ ሰማይ ፡ ወእንስሳሂ ፡ ወኵሎ ፡ ምድረ ፡ ወአራዊተ ፡ ዘይትሐወስ ፡ ዲበ ፡ ምድር ።

translations.lxx: And God said, Let us make man according to our image and likeness, and let them have dominion over the fish of the sea, and over the flying creatures of heaven, and over the cattle and all the earth, and over all the reptiles that creep on the earth.
translations.kjv: And God said, Let us make man in our image, after our likeness: and let them have dominion over the fish of the sea, and over the fowl of the air, and over the cattle, and over all the earth, and over every creeping thing that creepeth upon the earth.

verses.geez: ወገብሮ ፡ እግዚአብሔር ፡ ለእጓለ ፡ እመሕያው ፡ በአምሳለ ፡ እግዚአብሔር ፡ ተባዕተ ፡ ወአንስተ ፡ ገብሮሙ ።

translations.lxx: And God made man, according to the image of God he made him, male and female he made them.
translations.kjv: So God created man in his own image, in the image of God created he him; male and female created he them.

verses.geez:
ወባረኮሙ ፡ እግዚአብሔር ፡ ወይቤሎሙ ፡ ብዝኁ ፡ ወተባዝኁ ፡ ወምልእዋ ፡ ለምድር ፡ ወቅንይዋ ፡ ወኰንንዎሙ ፡ ለዓሣተ ፡
                  ባሕር ፡ ወለአዕዋፈ ፡ ሰማይ ፡ ወለኵሉ ፡ እንስሳ ፡ ወለኵሉ ፡ ዘይትሐወስ ፡ ዲበ ፡ ምድር ።

translations.lxx: And God blessed them, saying, Increase and multiply, and fill the earth and subdue it, and have dominion over the fish of the seas and flying creatures of heaven, and all the cattle and all the earth, and all the reptiles that creep on the earth.
translations.kjv: And God blessed them, and God said unto them, Be fruitful, and multiply, and replenish the earth, and subdue it: and have dominion over the fish of the sea, and over the fowl of the air, and over every living thing that moveth upon the earth.

verses.geez:
ወይቤ ፡ እግዚአብሔር ፡ ናሁ ፡ ወሀብኩክሙ ፡ ኵሎ ፡ ሣዕረ ፡ ዘይዘራእ ፡ ወይበቍል ፡ በዘርኡ ፡ ተዘሪኦ ፡ ዲበ ፡ ኵሉ
                  ፡ ምድር ፡ ወኵሉ ፡ ዕፀው ፡ ዘሀሎ ፡ ውስቴቱ ፡ ዘርኡ ፡ ዘይዘራእ ፡ በፍሬሁ ፡ ለክሙ ፡ ውእቱ ፡ መብልዕ ፤

translations.lxx: And God said, Behold I have given to you every seed-bearing herb sowing seed which is upon all the earth, and every tree which has in itself the fruit of seed that is sown, to you it shall be for food.
translations.kjv: And God said, Behold, I have given you every herb bearing seed, which is upon the face of all the earth, and every tree, in the which is the fruit of a tree yielding seed; to you it shall be for meat.

verses.geez:
ወለኵሉ ፡ አራዊተ ፡ ምድር ፡ ወለኵሉ ፡ አዕዋፈ ፡ ሰማይ ፡ ወለኵሉ ፡ ዘይትሐወስ ፡ ውስተ ፡ ምድር ፡ ዘቦ ፡ መንፈሰ ፡
                  ሕይወት ፡ ወኵሉ ፡ ሐመልማለ ፡ ሣዕር ፡ ይኩንክሙ ፡ መብልዐ ፡ ወኮነ ፡ ከማሁ ።

translations.lxx: And to all the wild beasts of the earth, and to all the flying creatures of heaven, and to every reptile creeping on the earth, which has in itself the breath of life, even every green plant for food; and it was so.
translations.kjv: And to every beast of the earth, and to every fowl of the air, and to every thing that creepeth upon the earth, wherein there is life, I have given every green herb for meat: and it was so.

verses.geez:
ወርእየ ፡ እግዚአብሔር ፡ ኵሎ ፡ ዘገብረ ፡ ከመ ፡ ጥቀ ፡ ሠናይ ፡ ወኮነ ፡ ሌሊተ ፡ ወጸብሐ ፡ ወኮነ ፡ ሳድስተ ፡
                  ዕለተ ።

translations.lxx: And God saw all the things that he had made, and, behold, they were very good. And there was evening and there was morning, the sixth day.
translations.kjv: And God saw every thing that he had made, and, behold, it was very good. And the evening and the morning were the sixth day.

note: In the beginning, God created the heavens and the earth. The foundation text. Read alongside Jubilees 2 for the angelic retelling, and alongside 1 Enoch 72 for the cosmic calendar that organizes creation's time.
